sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MDU Resources (NYSE:MDU) Shares Move Above Key Average Gaining Traction
feed.summary: MDU Resources (NYSE:MDU) has seen its shares move above a key average, indicating positive traction in the market. The company operates in the utilities and infrastructure services sector, focusing on energy distribution, construction services, and pipeline operations. MDU Resources provides energy services across the upper Midwest and Pacific Northwest.

feed.title: Rx Rundown: Merck, Gilead Sciences and Sanofi and more
feed.summary: This edition of Rx Rundown provides a weekly summary of medical marketing news, dealmaking, and industry chatter. Key highlights include significant acquisitions and partnerships by pharmaceutical giants like Merck, Novartis, Gilead Sciences, and Sanofi, alongside various FDA approvals and critical industry news such as Takeda's restructuring, Pfizer's Lyme disease vaccine trial results, and legal issues impacting social media platforms and pharmaceutical companies. Funding rounds for several biotech firms and new initiatives in healthcare technology and patient care are also covered.

feed.title: Ford Issues 2026 Proxy Statement, Sets Virtual Annual Meeting for May 14
feed.summary: Ford has released its 2026 proxy statement and announced that its annual meeting of shareholders will be held virtually on Thursday, May 14, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Shareholders can participate, vote, and submit questions online. The company also provided an overview of its global operations and strategic plan, Ford+, which focuses on growth, value creation, and customer-centered business segments.

feed.title: McDonald's Corporation $MCD Position Lessened by Synergy Asset Management LLC

Despite this reduction by Synergy, other major institutional investors like Norges Bank, Viking Global Investors, Amundi, Franklin Resources, and Arrowstreet Capital notably increased their positions, indicating strong institutional confidence in McDonald's, which is 70.29% owned by institutions. McDonald's recently reported an EPS beat and strong revenue growth, announced a quarterly dividend, and has seen notable insider selling including by its CEO.

feed.title: Granite Group Advisors LLC Increases Holdings in Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Granite Group Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT) by 51.8% in Q4, acquiring an additional 1,652 shares to reach a total of 4,840 shares valued at $2.341 million. This increase positions LMT as Granite Group Advisors' 20th largest holding, comprising about 1.3% of its portfolio, reflecting confidence in Lockheed Martin's future amidst positive industry trends like increased Pentagon contracts and Precision Strike Missile production. Despite a recent earnings per share miss, the company reported strong revenue, declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45, and has seen analysts like Susquehanna raise price targets, maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price near $623.

feed.title: Ball: Driving Decarbonisation with Sustainable Aluminium
feed.summary: Ball Corporation has released its 2025 annual report, showcasing robust performance with $13.16 billion in net sales and a strategic expansion of its manufacturing operations, including acquisitions in North America and Europe. The company made significant strides in decarbonization, with 84% of its global electricity derived from renewable sources and a 50% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions since 2017. Ball is also focused on circularity, aiming for 85% recycled content in its products by 2030, having reached 74% in 2025.

feed.title: Honeywell shareholders can vote online at May 22 annual meeting
feed.summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) will conduct its 2026 Annual Shareowners Meeting virtually on May 22, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. EDT. Shareholders recorded as of March 27, 2026, are eligible to vote. The virtual meeting link is www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/HON2026.

feed.title: T-Mobile 5G Home Internet Delivers Fast Speeds, Low Monthly Prices and Cash Back
feed.summary: T-Mobile is offering new subscribers to its 5G Home Internet plans low monthly prices and cash back rewards. Customers can choose between 5G Home Internet and 2-Gig Fiber, with various plans like Rely, Amplified, and All-In offering different speeds, features, and cashback amounts up to $300. The company emphasizes its fast speeds, guaranteed pricing for five years, and high customer satisfaction.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Cintas (CTAS) and Quanta Services (PWR)

Despite the "Hold" ratings, the overall Street consensus for both stocks leans towards a "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: [424B2] CITIGROUP INC Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., is offering callable contingent coupon equity-linked securities due April 11, 2028. These securities are linked to the performance of Oracle Corporation and UnitedHealth Group and offer contingent coupon payments if certain barrier events do not occur. Investors face principal risk if a "knock-in" event occurs and the worst-performing underlying finishes below its initial value.

feed.title: Citigroup (C) offers callable contingent‑coupon equity‑linked notes maturing 2029
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., is offering Callable Contingent Coupon Equity Linked Securities due April 5, 2029. These notes feature a $1,000 principal amount per security, an expected issue date of April 7, 2026, and periodic contingent coupons paying at least 12.15% per annum if certain conditions dependent on the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Nasdaq-100 Index, and Russell 2000 Index are met. The issuer retains the right to call the securities early, and payments at maturity, including potential significant principal loss, are subject to the performance of the worst-performing index and Citigroup's credit risk.

feed.title: Neutrogena®, Aveeno® and Rogaine® Release New Dermatology Research and Clinical Skincare Innovations on Healthy Aging, Moisturization, Sun Protection and Acne
feed.summary: Neutrogena®, Aveeno®, and Rogaine® are showcasing new scientific advancements and product innovations at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting. Their research focuses on healthy aging, deep moisturization, acne solutions, and enhanced sun protection, including new UV filter technologies. The brands aim to deliver accessible, science-backed solutions co-designed with dermatologists and trichologists to address key consumer and healthcare provider concerns.

feed.title: Should You Buy Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:ZBH) For Its Upcoming Dividend?
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (NYSE: ZBH) is set to trade ex-dividend shortly, with a payment of US$0.24 per share, resulting in a trailing yield of 1.1%. The company demonstrates strong dividend sustainability, paying out a modest 27% of earnings and 17% of free cash flow, alongside robust earnings per share growth of 18% over the past five years. This combination of growth, conservative payout ratios, and dividend increases suggests ZBH could be an attractive option for dividend-focused investors.

feed.title: People Roundup: Domain, CoStar Group, Hemnet
feed.summary: This week's People Roundup covers significant personnel news and changes at Domain, CoStar Group, and Hemnet. Domain, Australia's second-largest real estate portal, is reportedly undergoing layoffs across several divisions while simultaneously planning to increase its overall headcount. CoStar Group has appointed Nana Banerjee, a seasoned executive with experience in leading global technology and data-driven businesses, to its board as an independent director. Finally, Fredrik Strömsten, a co-founder of the Swedish real estate platform Qasa, has been proposed for appointment to the board of directors at Hemnet, the Swedish market leader.

feed.title: Rinse, repeat, win: Colgate Total and Mumbai Indians just changed the game
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive India has partnered with Mumbai Indians to promote oral health as a crucial aspect of athletic performance, leveraging the IPL's massive reach to drive a behavior shift. This collaboration positions Colgate Total as an essential part of an athlete's performance toolkit, aiming to premiumize oral care and expand its relevance across India. The campaign includes digital tools like QR-led dental consultations and focuses on demonstrating genuine behavioral change among the Mumbai Indians squad.

feed.title: Li Auto Announces Put Right Option for 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2028
feed.summary: Li Auto Inc. has announced a put right option for its 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2028, allowing noteholders to require the company to repurchase their notes on April 15, 2026. The repurchase price will be 100% of the principal amount plus accrued and unpaid interest. Noteholders must submit their requests between March 17, 2026, and April 14, 2026, following the procedures outlined in the notes' indenture.

feed.title: Is Raymond James Financial (RJF) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Share Pullback And Growth Record

feed.title: LENZ Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:LENZ) Analysts Are Cutting Their Estimates: Here's What You Need To Know
feed.summary: LENZ Therapeutics (NASDAQ:LENZ) recently released its yearly report, revealing revenues of US$19m, missing analyst predictions, and a statutory loss of US$2.85 per share, exceeding forecasts. Analysts have since cut next year's revenue estimates to US$30.3m and increased loss per share forecasts to US$3.62, leading to a 13% drop in the consensus price target to US$44.43. Despite the downgraded outlook, the company is still expected to experience revenue growth significantly faster than the broader industry.
